headline: Charter Communications: The Market Is Pricing A Total Collapse
summary: Charter Communications is deeply undervalued, trading at a 3x P/E and 5x EV/EBITDA, despite industry headwinds and high debt. Read more on CHTR stock here.

headline: Serve Robotics Appoints Andreas Lieber to Board of Directors
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, June 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Serve Robotics Inc. (Nasdaq: SERV), a leading autonomous robotics company, today announced the appointment of Andreas Lieber to the company’s Board of Directors, effective June 22, 2026. Mr. Lieber will replace Sarfraz Maredia, Global Head of Autonomous Mobility & Delivery at Uber, who is stepping down after serving three years on Serve's Board. Andreas Lieber brings deep experience scaling technology and logistics businesses across Uber, Postmate

headline: T-Mobile US (TMUS) to Employ Nearly 1,000 People by 2027, Reuters Reports
summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ:TMUS) is one of the top high-conviction stocks to buy according to hedge funds. Reuters reported on June 4 that, according to a statement from an Indian state ​government, T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ:TMUS) has plans to employ nearly 1,000 people by 2027 following the recent opening of its global capability center (GCC) […]
